violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving of the refrigeration units have an accumulation of milk residue. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
Various food product and beverages were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the reach in cooler shelves have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

The floors throughout the back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

The ceilings in retail area is in poor repair(missing tiles and water stains). Per interview with PIC, roof was being repaired during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
